objective: Export the DiscoverySignal type from the skill search signals boundary used by attachments.ts.
changes: Added a narrow DiscoverySignal string-literal union for the existing skill_discovery attachment signal field.
Kept the attachments.ts import type-only so the change adds no runtime code.

verification.notes: The src/utils/attachments.ts TS2305 diagnostic for DiscoverySignal no longer appears in the tsc log.

next_candidates: Add targeted internal-only module declarations for protectedNamespace, attributionTrailer, TerminalCaptureTool prompt, VerifyPlanExecutionTool constants, peerSessions, and workerAgent.
